{{Quote|This is private vessel Lark, property of the Camblian Order on the planet Eedoq. We are en route to Daemen to enroll three hundred and nine young people in the Clarion Scholars Academy.|Pilot of the Lark|<ref name="E9" />}}
The '''Camblian Order''' was a scientific organization that, shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], sent 309 prospective students<ref name="E9" /> from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> world of [[Eedoq]] to be enrolled at the [[Clarion Scholars Academy]] on<ref name="E9" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="EAOC" /> planet [[Daemen]]. However, their transport ship, the ''[[Lark]]'', was destroyed en route by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pilot [[Tars Nandy]], resulting in the deaths of all 309 children.<ref name="E9" />

During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]] in the Outer Rim Territories, a cult known as the [[Acolytes of Dread Rur]] stalked the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|spacelanes]], capturing [[Passenger liner|starliners]] and sending the [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] and all aboard to fiery deaths within nearby [[Star/Legends|suns]]. The [[Corellian Security Force]] dispatched agent [[Bey]] to investigate the group, and he foiled an Acolyte plot to destroy a Camblian Order liner carrying hundreds of young scholars departing from [[Glova]].<ref name="CP">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-12-tales-of-the-new-republic|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 12: Tales of the New Republic}}</ref>
